title: encyclia citrina
intro: Encyclia citrina, also known as the yellow-encyclia orchid, is a species of orchid that is native to the tropical regions of Central America and Mexico. It is a terrestrial orchid with yellow flowers that are highly fragrant and have medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, sore throat, and digestive problems, due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of Encyclia citrina include tea infusions and tinctures, which can be used to benefit from its medicinal properties and health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and promoting relaxation.
